manifest.name: vinyl-oracle
manifest.author: DreamLayer Team
manifest.description: Point at a record sleeve and get the pressing, the year, and what the crate is worth — matched against Discogs. Bring your own token; the crate follows you across sessions.
manifest.forwho: For crate-diggers, collectors, and anyone holding a record they can't quite place.
long: Look at a record sleeve and the Vinyl Oracle names the pressing, the release year, and the going rate.
Matched live against the Discogs database. Add your own Discogs personal-access token once and it's remembered across sessions.
Only the record's identifying text leaves the device to do the lookup — the crate itself stays yours.
